source_pr.title: executor: add test for pr 45284
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #45607

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: IndexMerge reader can hang/exit unexpectedly when context is cancelled mid-flight (failpoint-driven reproduction in executor/test/indexmergereadtest/index_merge_reader_test.go)
failure_signature: Context cancellation during IndexMerge worker loops (issue reproduction via failpoint `testCancelContext`)
root_cause_explanation: The executor's IndexMerge async worker loops had a race/ordering issue around channel sends and context cancellation (reproduced via failpoint-driven context cancel in a unit test). The fix adjusts the injection position and uses a dedicated cancel func for test to ensure cancellation is handled safely without hanging or exiting prematurely.
fix_pattern: Handle context cancellation safely in async worker loops (reorder channel sends / failpoint injection to avoid hangs or premature exit).
analysis:
PR title: executor: add test for pr 45284

Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: race = "on",
Changed files (3): executor/index_merge_reader.go, executor/test/indexmergereadtest/BUILD.bazel, executor/test/indexmergereadtest/index_merge_reader_test.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
